title: Trading just changed forever
author: StevenVinyl
selftext:
In 3 years, 90%+ of retail will be AI-driven. Not algo bots. Reasoning agents.  
  
The difference: algo bots compress rules into one output. AI agents reason through a thesis in real time.  
  
full breakdown:  
  
[00:00](https://x.com/StevenVinyl/status/2054338750487122398?t=0) the thesis  
[01:00](https://x.com/StevenVinyl/status/2054338750487122398?t=60) determinism vs non-determinism  
[02:40](https://x.com/StevenVinyl/status/2054338750487122398?t=160) contextual edge > mechanical edge  
[03:20](https://x.com/StevenVinyl/status/2054338750487122398?t=200) strategy in plain english  
[04:05](https://x.com/StevenVinyl/status/2054338750487122398?t=245) anatomy of a live agent run  
[07:04](https://x.com/StevenVinyl/status/2054338750487122398?t=424) the moment an agent made a call no rule told it to make  
[08:45](https://x.com/StevenVinyl/status/2054338750487122398?t=525) TLDR
